categories.description: Confirms that your attribution profile has been reset per your GDPR / CCPA right-to-erasure request. Details what was redacted, when hard-delete completes (90 days from now), and how to appeal.
categories.notes: Cannot opt out — this is a legal-obligation notification per GDPR Art. 12 + 17. The subject has a right to know their erasure request was processed.

categories.description: Admin-only. Notifies tenant admin when the module merged N anonymous attribution profiles into an identified profile. Ops audit signal.
categories.notes: Enterprise-only (fires only when attribution_merge entitlement is on). Default opt-out because most admins don't need this signal; opt-in for ops teams that audit merges.

categories.description: Compliance-team digest. Daily / weekly batched report of AttributionSuppressedByConsent events — count, breakdown by consent_state_summary, no PII. Feeds the compliance-team quarterly regulatory review.
categories.notes: Default opt-in for the compliance role only. The batched daily cadence prevents the notification queue from flooding on high-consent-refusal days.

categories.description: Marketing-team digest. Fires when MarkAttributionChurnedJob completes a nightly pass with N > threshold new churned profiles. Includes cohort breakdown by first-touch source. Signal to trigger a re-engagement campaign.
categories.notes: Default opt-in for marketing role only. Non-Enterprise tenants: cohort breakdown is per (first-touch source) only. Enterprise: includes lifecycle-source cross-tab.
